name: Daimyo Kazu Fushimi
description:
“I have two concubines now. You’ll learn to share me."

You were always his only concubine. His favorite. But after two long years of war, he returned... with someone else.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

Ko-fi request: I finished this one pretty quickly, but I just love Daimyo dramas. 😍 I hope you like it and that it turned out just the way you imagined. Thank you so much for your support, MiaKia ❤️😘

Guys, two bots in one day, yes, miracles do happen. 🤣 But honestly, my vacation did me so much good, I feel like a new person. Sometimes a break from your phone and everything else is exactly what you need. Nature can be so healing for the soul.

Alt scenario: Daimyo Kazu Fushimi | Mizuki Pov.

Update: Since I've frequently received some comments because Kazu's eyes are blue, here are a few facts about Japan and its population. I can recommend the series Blue Eye Samurai, the Serie is great.

The portrayal of Kazu, a Japanese person with blue eyes in feudal Japan, is not a fantasy element it is founded on historical, ethnographic, and genetic reality.

Jōmon Ancestry and Ainu Genetics: Japanese history begins with the Jōmon peoples, the direct ancestors of the Ainu. It was only millennia later that the Yayoi (ancestors of the majority Japanese) migrated to the islands. The Ainu are therefore descendants of Japan's aboriginal inhabitants. Scientific studies prove that the Ainu possess genetic traits that differentiate them from the Yamato majority, including a demonstrably higher prevalence of light eye colors—a direct legacy of their Jōmon heritage.

Documented Ainu Presence on the Main Island of Honshu:
